items.summary: Fix the actor creation logic in useActor.ts so that it never passes both `agent` and `agentOptions` simultaneously to `createActor`. When an authenticated identity/agent is available, pass only the `agent` parameter. When no identity is available, pass only `agentOptions` (or construct the agent first and then pass only the resulting agent). Ensure no duplicate or conflicting actor configuration reaches the ICP SDK.

Audit useGetCallerUserProfile.ts and App.tsx to ensure the profile query is only enabled and executed after the actor is fully initialized (not before authentication state and actor creation are complete). Gate the query with a strict readiness check so premature unauthenticated canister calls cannot occur.
